title: AI Superhero
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a blockbuster superhero portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an epic original superhero portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main framing. Reimagine clothing as a premium superhero suit with textures and colors inspired by the original outfit, add a powerful heroic stance, dramatic blockbuster lighting, a city skyline background, subtle dynamic energy effects, realistic facial detail, and sharp movie-poster quality.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, deformed face, extra arms, extra legs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, duplicate features, watermark, logo, text, weak lighting, pixelated, horror, gore, blood, copied existing superhero costume, cropped body, unrealistic proportions, noise, artifacts
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. midnight city skyline, lightning suit...
